Hi there!
I’ll be brief. It’s finally time; I figured it all out. I teased the cohort-based course a while ago, and here are the details.
The Palindrome Lectures
Let me announce The Palindrome Lectures, a seasonal bi-weekly series of live lectures, delivered by me and various machine learning experts in the field.
The theme of the first season is Neural Networks From Scratch, where we’ll build a complete framework on our own.
The first 60-minute session will cover the prerequisites: vectors, matrices, and their implementation in Python; a mix of classical blackboard + chalk style lectures with intensive live coding.
It’ll be
held on September 26th, 16:00 CET,
and available for paid subscribers on the annual plan.
If you would like to participate, register on the link below:...
